title: 深圳市养犬管理条例（2019年修正）
issuing_body: 深圳市城市管理和综合执法局
evidence_summary: The regulation defines dog registration and outdoor conduct. Outdoor activities require adult control, dog tag, leash, avoidance of vulnerable pedestrians, immediate feces removal, and injury-prevention measures in elevators. It bans dogs from multiple public places including parks and provides exemptions for guide and assistance dogs.

title: 犬只能不能进入公园？
issuing_body: 深圳市城市管理和综合执法局
evidence_summary: The official FAQ states that, under Article 24 of the dog-management regulation, dogs are prohibited from listed public places including parks, except guide dogs and assistance dogs.

title: 犬只进行户外活动时，携犬人应当遵守那些规定？
issuing_body: 深圳市城市管理和综合执法局
evidence_summary: The official FAQ restates outdoor dog activity obligations: adult handler, dog tag, leash, registration certificate, avoidance of elderly people, disabled people, pregnant people and children, immediate feces removal, taxi-driver consent, and injury-prevention measures in elevators.

title: 可以携带宠物狗进入公园吗？
issuing_body: 深圳市城市管理和综合执法局 / 深圳政府在线
geo_scope: Jingtian North 6th Street; Shenzhen citywide parks
evidence_summary: The government answer says dogs are generally banned from restricted public places, but identifies Jingtian North Sixth Street as a pet-theme park that allows dogs, encourages districts and streets to create pet-theme community parks, and mentions a planned park shared-access approach.

title: 《深圳市养犬管理条例》解读
issuing_body: 深圳市城市管理和综合执法局
evidence_summary: The policy interpretation frames Shenzhen's approach as shifting from prohibition/limitation toward regulation/management, with registration, immunization, outdoor conduct requirements, public-place restrictions, and departmental enforcement responsibilities.

title: 深圳市养犬管理规定
issuing_body: 深圳市城市管理和综合执法局 / 深圳市司法局
evidence_summary: The regulation provides administrative procedures for dog registration, including registration service points and convenient points such as pet hospitals, linking pet-service infrastructure to governance implementation.

title: 深圳市城市管理和综合执法局关于延长《深圳市养犬管理规定》有效期的通知
issuing_body: 深圳市城市管理和综合执法局 / 深圳市司法局
evidence_summary: The 2025 notice extends the validity of the Shenzhen dog-management provisions to 2030-10-31, indicating continuity of the current governance apparatus.

title: 深圳经济特区公园条例
issuing_body: 深圳市人大常委会 / 深圳市政府公报
evidence_summary: The park regulation requires the urban management authority to publish a list of parks where pets may be carried and to specify behavior norms for pet visits; pet carriers must assume outdoor safety-management responsibility.

title: 《深圳经济特区公园条例》5月1日起实施
issuing_body: 深圳政府在线 / 深圳特区报
evidence_summary: Government news about the park regulation states that public concerns about pet access have explicit responses, including a requirement to formulate and publish pet-carrying park lists and behavior norms.

title: 《深圳经济特区公园条例（征求意见稿）》公开征集修改意见及采纳情况说明
issuing_body: 深圳市城市管理和综合执法局
evidence_summary: The consultation feedback text records draft park conduct rules, including a proposed prohibition on bringing pets into parks in violation of park management rules, alongside broader order and environmental management concerns.
